---
---

::: {.hero-section}

# Where Statistical Rigor Meets Intelligent Systems

A space for analytical thinking, statistical exploration, and applied machine learning.

Over time, I’ve found that the most meaningful solutions rarely emerge from intuition alone — they come from understanding patterns, questioning assumptions, and building systems that can reason through uncertainty.

My work sits at the intersection of statistics, programming, and intelligent problem solving, with a growing focus on data science and AI-driven applications.

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.custom-button}

:::

---

## Current Focus

::: {.focus-grid}

::: {.focus-card}
### Statistical Thinking

Exploring how classical statistical principles continue to shape modern machine learning and AI systems.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### Intelligent Systems

Building practical solutions that combine analytical reasoning with automation and scalable workflows.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### Applied Problem Solving

Using Python, data analysis, and structured experimentation to solve real-world data challenges.
:::

:::

---

## Featured Work

### AI-Assisted Name Matching Engine

A Python-based intelligent matching system designed to standardize and reconcile inconsistent entity names across datasets using analytical preprocessing and similarity-based logic.

### Anomaly Detection & Analytics

Exploring statistical and machine learning approaches for identifying irregular patterns in business and operational datasets.

---

## Areas of Interest

- Statistics
- Machine Learning
- Artificial Intelligence
- Data Analytics
- Predictive Modeling
- NLP & Entity Resolution
- Analytical Automation
- Intelligent Decision Systems
